---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: citations.bib
biblio-style: style.csl
---

:::{section-2022}
__2022 (2)__
-------------
* @metz2022georeferenced
* @metz2022freshwater
:::

:::{section-2021}
__2021 (1)__
-------------
* @itoiz2021emerging
:::

:::{section-2020}
__2020 (3)__
-------------
* @huber2020environmental
* @accattatis2020identifying
* @berman2020field
:::


:::{section-2019}
__2019 (5)__
-------------
* @metz2019global
* @metz2019diversity
* @wanderley2019flowdiv
* @huber2019primer
* @singer2019contrasted
:::

:::{section-2018}
__2018 (1)__
-------------
* @nievas2018protein
:::


:::{section-2017}
__2017 (1)__
-------------
* @llames2017interplay
:::


:::{section-2016}
__2016 (1)__
-------------
* @metz2016fullssr
:::

:::{section-2014}
__2014 (1)__
-------------
* @moreyra2014obesidad
:::
